studyName: Single Cell Analysis Program - Transcriptome (SCAP-T) (U. Penn)

tables.description: The UPenn NGS sample attributes table contains the NGS quality metrics obtained after processing the samples through the NGS pipeline.

variables.name: 3polyA(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for polyA from 3' end

variables.name: 3polyA(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for polyA from 3' end

variables.name: 5polyT(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for polyT from 5' end

variables.name: 5polyT(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for polyT from 5' end

variables.name: AmbiguousMappedExonic
variables.description: Number of reads that mapped ambiguosly to exons of more than one gene and were not counted

variables.name: AmbiguousMappedIntronic
variables.description: Number of reads that mapped ambiguosly to introns of more than one gene and were not counted

variables.name: AvgInpReadLen
variables.description: Average read length

variables.name: AvgReadPerGeneExonic
variables.description: Average number of reads that are exonic per gene

variables.name: AvgReadPerGeneIntronic
variables.description: Average number of reads that are intronic per gene

variables.name: AvgUniqMapLen
variables.description: Average read length for uniquely mapped reads

variables.name: BLAST_Bacteria
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Bacteria

variables.name: BLAST_ERCC
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to ERCC

variables.name: BLAST_Fish
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Fish

variables.name: BLAST_Fly
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Fly

variables.name: BLAST_HitsNotCounted
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to any other species

variables.name: BLAST_HitsNotTarget_or_ERCC
variables.description: Percentage hits that map neither to the Human genome nor to ERCC sequences

variables.name: BLAST_Human
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Human

variables.name: BLAST_Mouse
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Mouse

variables.name: BLAST_Rat
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Rat

variables.name: BLAST_TotalHits
variables.description: The number of reads out of 5000 randomly selected reads that map against the nt database using BLAST

variables.name: BLAST_Yeast
variables.description: Number of BLAST matches to Yeast

variables.name: BLAST_version
variables.description: Blast version used

variables.name: CDS(first)
variables.description: Number of reads trimmed for the CDS 3' Adapter

variables.name: CDS_RC(first)
variables.description: Number of reads trimmed for the CDS 3' Adapter Reverse complement

variables.name: FastQC_version
variables.description: FastQC version used

variables.name: GencodeVersion
variables.description: Gencode version

variables.name: HTSeq_version
variables.description: HTSeq version used

variables.name: HumanGenomeAssembly
variables.description: Human Genome assembly used

variables.name: MaxReadsPerGeneExonic
variables.description: Maximum number of reads that are exonic per gene

variables.name: MaxReadsPerGeneIntronic
variables.description: Maximum number of reads that are intronic per gene

variables.name: Multimapped
variables.description: % Multimapped reads by STAR aligner

variables.name: NGS_Protocol_FileName
variables.description: Document that details the NGS processing pipeline applied to the SCAP-T samples

variables.name: NexteraXT_TransposaseRC(first)
variables.description: Number of reads trimmed for 3' NexteraXT Transposase Reverse complement

variables.name: NoExonicFeature
variables.description: Number of reads that did not map to any exon as reported by HTSeq

variables.name: NoIntronicFeature
variables.description: Number of reads that did not map to any intron as reported by HTSeq

variables.name: NumGenesExpressed
variables.description: Number of genes with at least one exonic read

variables.name: NumGenesWithIntronicExpression
variables.description: Number of genes with at least one intronic read

variables.name: PennSCAP-T_pipeline_version
variables.description: Version of the Penn SCAP-T pipeline

variables.name: ReadsCountedExonic
variables.description: Number of reads counted by HTSeq as exonic

variables.name: ReadsCountedIntronic
variables.description: Number of reads counted by HTSeq as intronic

variables.name: ReadsTooShort
variables.description: % Reads too short and not mapped as reported by STAR aligner

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: STAR_version
variables.description: STAR version used

variables.name: Samtools_version
variables.description: Samtools version used

variables.name: UniqMap
variables.description: % Uniquely mapped reads by STAR aligner

variables.name: aRNAPrimer(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for the aRNA primer

variables.name: aRNAPrimer(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for the aRNA primer

variables.name: aRNAPrimerRC(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for the reverse complement of aRNA primer

variables.name: aRNAPrimerRC(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for the reverse complement of aRNA primer

variables.name: indexAdapter(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for the Index adapter

variables.name: indexAdapter(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for the Index adapter

variables.name: nBelowPhredThreshold(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads with Phred Score less than the threshold for at least one position

variables.name: nBelowPhredThreshold(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads with Phred Score less than the threshold for at least one position

variables.name: nBothDiscarded
variables.description: Number of read pairs discarded after trimming for being too short (< 20 nt)

variables.name: nBothTrimmed
variables.description: Number of read pairs trimmed for contaminants

variables.name: nFirstDiscarded
variables.description: Number of first reads discarded after trimming for being too short (< 20 nt)

variables.name: nFirstTrimmed
variables.description: Number of reads trimmed for contaminants (First reads)

variables.name: nSecondDiscarded
variables.description: Number of second reads discarded after trimming for being too short (< 20 nt)

variables.name: nSecondTrimmed
variables.description: Number of reads trimmed for contaminants (Second reads)

variables.name: nTSOFiltered(first)
variables.description: Number of reads filtered for being the TSO primer concatemers

variables.name: nTotalReadPairs
variables.description: Number of total reads from RNA-Sequencing

variables.name: removed3N(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for Ns from 3' end

variables.name: removed3N(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for Ns from 3' end

variables.name: removed5N(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for Ns from 5' end

variables.name: removed5N(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for Ns from 5' end

variables.name: univAdapterRC(first)
variables.description: Number of first reads trimmed for the reverse complement of the Universal adapter

variables.name: univAdapterRC(second)
variables.description: Number of second reads trimmed for the reverse complement of the Universal adapter

tables.description: The UPenn sample attributes table includes phenotype information about the samples collected by NCBI BioSample (analyte type, body site where sample was collected, and tumor status), experimental protocol information, and metadata about how the samples were collected and processed.

variables.name: ADDITIONAL_SAMPLE_COMMENTS
variables.description: Additional sample comments

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BARCODE
variables.description: Unique sequence that is part of the Illumina barcode

variables.name: BIOPSY_COMMENTS
variables.description: Any comments from the surgeon who carried out the biopsy

variables.name: BIOPSY_ID
variables.description: Identifier to indicate the samples collected from the same biopsy

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: C1_ADDITIONAL_REAGENTS_ADDED
variables.description: Additional reagents added besides the standard

variables.name: C1_CHIP
variables.description: C1 Chip information

variables.name: C1_EXP_ID
variables.description: Unique ID to identify samples that were collected using the same C1 experiment (if applicable)

variables.name: C1_SAMPLE_LOAD
variables.description: Fresh/Frozen nuclei loaded on the C1 chip

variables.name: CELL_SUBCLASS
variables.description: Specifies the cell sub-class. For instance: pyramidal, 5-HT, interneuron

variables.name: DEMULTIPLEXER
variables.description: Demultiplexer used

variables.name: FMAID
variables.description: Foundational Model of Anatomy ID for the body site where the biopsy is taken from

variables.name: HARVEST_METHOD
variables.description: Method by which cells are harvested

variables.name: HARVEST_QUANT
variables.description: Amount of RNA harvested

variables.name: HIGH_THROUGHPUT_SEQUENCER
variables.description: High throughput sequencer used

variables.name: INPUT_AMOUNT
variables.description: Input amount of RNA that goes in to library preparation

variables.name: IS_PAIRED?
variables.description: Paired-end sequencing used?

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: IS_polyA_SELECTED
variables.description: Does the RNA go through poly(A) selection?

variables.name: LIBRARY_BY
variables.description: Code for the person who prepared the library for sequencing

variables.name: LIBRARY_DATE
variables.description: Library date

variables.name: MULTI_FLOWCELLS?
variables.description: Is the sample sequenced using multiple flowcells?

variables.name: MULTI_LANES?
variables.description: Is the sample sequenced using multiple lanes?

variables.name: NUMBER_aRNA_AMPLIFICATION_ROUNDS
variables.description: Number of aRNA amplification rounds

variables.name: NUM_PCR_CYCLES_NEXTERA
variables.description: Number of PCR cycles used

variables.name: NUM_PCR_CYCLES_cDNA
variables.description: Number of PCR cycles used

variables.name: OPERATOR
variables.description: Code for the person who operated the sequencer

variables.name: PROTOCOL_A_FILENAME
variables.description: Protocol A Filename (If applicable)

variables.name: PROTOCOL_A_NAME
variables.description: Protocol A Name (If applicable)

variables.name: PROTOCOL_B_FILENAME
variables.description: Protocol B Filename (If applicable)

variables.name: PROTOCOL_B_NAME
variables.description: Protocol B Name (If applicable)

variables.name: PROTOCOL_C_FILENAME
variables.description: Protocol C Filename (If applicable)

variables.name: PROTOCOL_C_NAME
variables.description: Protocol C Name (If applicable)

variables.name: PUTATIVE_CELL_TYPE
variables.description: Specifies the cell class. For instance neuron, cardiomyocyte, brown adipose tissue, etc.

variables.name: READ_LENGTH
variables.description: Read length

variables.name: RIBOSOMAL_DEPLETION_KIT
variables.description: Ribosomal depletion kit used

variables.name: RNASEQ_COMMENTS
variables.description: Additional comments on the sequencing for the sample

variables.name: RNASEQ_GRP
variables.description: ID that groups the samples that were sequenced on the same flowcell

variables.name: SAMPLE_HARVEST_BY
variables.description: Code for the person who harvested the cells

variables.name: SAMPLE_HARVEST_DATE
variables.description: Harvest date

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_DATE
variables.description: Sequencing date

variables.name: SEQUENCING_PLATFORM
variables.description: Sequencing platform

variables.name: SEQ_CENTER
variables.description: Sequencing Center

variables.name: SLICE_ID
variables.description: Identifier to indicate the samples collected from the same slice of the biopsy

variables.name: SOURCE_REGION
variables.description: Region of cell from where the input comes from

variables.name: SOURCE_TYPE
variables.description: Cell source

variables.name: SOURCE_UNIT
variables.description: Unit of source from where the sample material comes from

variables.name: SURGEON
variables.description: Randomly picked code for the surgeon who did the biopsy

variables.name: SURGERY_YEAR
variables.description: Year of surgery

variables.name: SpikeInDilution
variables.description: SpikeIn Dilution

variables.name: SpikeInType
variables.description: SpikeIn Type (if it is used)

variables.name: TREATMENT
variables.description: Any special treatment that the cell went through - such as TIVA

variables.name: cDNA_BY
variables.description: Code for the person who prepared the cDNA

variables.name: cDNA_DATE
variables.description: CDNA preparation date

tables.description: The UPenn sample images table contains image filenames, descriptions, file formats, and any additional notes relating to the images.

variables.name: IMAGE_DESCRIPTION
variables.description: Image Description

variables.name: IMAGE_FILENAME
variables.description: Image filename. These files are all available publicly through the dbGaP FTP site: ftp://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/dbgap/studies/phs000833.

variables.name: IMAGE_FILETYPE
variables.description: File format

variables.name: IMAGE_NOTES
variables.description: Any additional remarks connected to the image

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID
